encoding: int16 LE, C-order, per-array scale; byte-shuffle then gzip
defaultScenarioPolicyBasis: 2025 UNEP current-policy and Climate Action Tracker policies/action estimates put end-century warming roughly between 2.6 C and just below 3 C; the app maps the reference case to the closest fully grounded SSP pathway and treats it as a reference, not a prediction or hidden scenario average.

_meta.method: k = AR6 SPM.1 assessed best-estimate / raw ensemble global mean; assessed interpolated across anchor decades 2030/2050/2090; baseline 1995-2014 (AR6 -0.85C offset from 1850-1900).
_meta.scope: temperature only; precip/humidity served as raw consensus+spread
_meta.source: IPCC AR6 WGI SPM Table SPM.1; Hausfather et al. 2022 Nature
